verificationScope: The host runner fixes gpt-5.6-sol with ultra reasoning, isolates model and publisher worktrees, and mechanically verifies report metadata plus the official arXiv announcement date and complete primary-New ID sets. It cannot independently attest private service-side reasoning or make a benchmark-equivalence claim.
publicationRule: Publish only schema-1.3 editions whose three reports exactly match a stable host-fetched arXiv snapshot, contain identical run metadata and explicitly verified model selection, complete every score and audit, and document full-text review of every final top-ten paper.
